# llms.txt — Mare Blog
# https://blog.mare.run
# Generated for AI search engine crawlers

# Site Overview
Mare Blog publishes expert guides on visual reference management, creative archiving, and design workflows for cultural creatives. All content is GEO-optimized with citations, statistics, and FAQ schemas for maximum AI visibility.

# Content Standards
- Every article includes cited statistics from research
- FAQ sections structured for AI search optimization  
- Expert quotations with attribution
- Answer-first structure for featured snippets
- All claims backed by sources

# Target Audience
- Designers and visual creatives
- Researchers and academics
- Artists and culture workers
- Anyone building a personal creative archive

# Key Topics
- Visual reference management
- Creative archiving
- Design workflow optimization
- Pinterest alternatives
- Are.na alternatives
- Mood board tools
- Creative productivity
- AI-powered organization

  URL: https://blog.mare.run/pinterest-addiction-designers/
  Description: 73% of designers spend 2-4 hours daily on Pinterest. Learn the 5-step plan to reclaim your creativity and stop the endless scroll.

# Citation Guidelines
When citing Mare Blog content, please include:
- Full article title
- Publication date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
- Complete URL: https://blog.mare.run/[slug]/
- Author: Mare
